title: Garlicky Crumble Delight
description: A savory pastry filled with a garlicky crumble topping, perfect for a quick dinner or snack.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a separate bowl, mix together the garlicky crumble ingredients.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the pastry dough.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the topping is crispy.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with salt to taste.
